sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports right middle finger pain for five days following a motor vehicle accident, specifically at the end of the finger. He states he was rear-ended at a four-way stop while he was stopped. The patient reports minimal damage to his car, with a crumpled trunk. He denies other injuries.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The x-ray reveals a distal phalanx fracture of the middle finger. Physical exam reveals tenderness over the distal phalanx of the right middle finger. Vital signs are within normal limits.
medical_concepts: distal phalanx of the right middle finger

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has a distal phalanx fracture of the middle finger secondary to a motor vehicle accident.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Rescribe tramadol 50 mg every six hours as needed for pain for two days, dispensing eight tablets. Provide a finger splint. Schedule a follow-up x-ray in two weeks.

medical_concepts: distal phalanx of the right middle finger
